overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player wading through a flooded urban waterfront at night. The player loots a floating body, then moves through neon-lit water past a 'Boozo Boys' sign and examines a holographic graffiti symbol on a concrete wall before turning back toward the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded waterfront alley with floating body

events.description: player opens loot interface to collect items from floating body
camera pans up from body to reveal city skyline through fence

agents.ego_description: standing in murky water looting a floating corpse with glowing items

entered.detail: corpse floating in murky water with lootable glowing items
large white neon graffiti sign reading 'Boozo Boys' on concrete wall
dark flooded ground covering the walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a first-person view looking down at a floating body in flooded urban water. The player interacts with the corpse to collect items, triggering a game UI. The camera then pans upward, revealing a neon-lit city skyline visible through a metal fence in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded waterfront promenade with city vista

events.description: begins wading forward through waist-deep water toward metal fence
turns right to follow the concrete retaining wall

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through dark water toward the illuminated city skyline

entered.detail: tall vertical metal barrier separating waterfront from city proper
dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers with colorful neon lights
large red illuminated structural archway framework ahead

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the flooded area toward a metal fence, with the neon-lit city skyline visible beyond. The camera turns right to follow a concrete retaining wall, bringing a large red arch structure into view ahead while the 'Boozo Boys' sign recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded walkway along concrete retaining wall

events.description: glowing holographic graffiti symbol becomes visible on wall ahead

agents.ego_description: moving along the concrete wall toward a complex glowing holographic symbol

entered.detail: intricate glowing white symbol with geometric patterns projected on concrete
tall weathered concrete wall with surface graffiti and green moss

segments.scene_description: The player continues wading along the concrete retaining wall, approaching a complex holographic graffiti symbol glowing white against the dark surface. The red arch structure moves to the left side of the frame while the 'Boozo Boys' sign remains visible on the right, and the city skyline disappears from view behind the player.

scene_state.functional_zone: close inspection of holographic wall art

events.description: slows to examine holographic graffiti detail up close
turns left away from wall and moves back toward open waterfront

agents.ego_description: examining the intricate holographic symbol up close before turning away from the wall

entered.detail: tall metal barrier coming back into view as camera turns
illuminated skyscrapers visible again as camera faces open water

segments.scene_description: The player approaches very close to the holographic graffiti, revealing intricate geometric details of the glowing symbol. After brief observation, the camera turns left away from the wall, causing the hologram and concrete wall to exit the frame while the metal fence and city skyline re-enter the view as the player heads back toward the open waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a flooded urban waterfront, moving from a grim discovery toward a glowing piece of street art before returning to a view of the city. It begins with a close-up of a floating body in the dark water, where the camera pans upward to reveal a neon-lit skyline shimmering behind a distant metal fence. As the player wades forward, the view shifts right to follow a concrete retaining wall, causing a Boozo Boys sign to recede while a large red arch structure emerges ahead. The camera then closes in on a complex, white holographic graffiti symbol glowing against the dark concrete, momentarily obscuring the skyline as the player examines the intricate geometric details. Finally, the perspective turns away from the wall, leaving the hologram behind to re-establish a view of the metal fence and the distant city lights across the open water.
